tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The three fail-to-pass tests (test_cmake_compiler_flags, test_dwarf_dot_directory_handling, test_dwarf_no_raw_getIncludeDirectory_call) all read file contents and check for exact string patterns using 'in content' or regex. test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests check for specific strings that are NOT present in the original codebase (e.g., '-fdebug-compilation-dir=.' and 'include_dir == "."'), so a stub or no-op would not pass. The agent must actually modify the files.
